changes: — SECTION_11.md v11.44 + Workout Reference Library v0.7 + push.py v0.6 (2026-06-30) —

v11.44: C20/FTP Development Track Integration — Section 11 B now supports `specialization_mode: "c20_ftp"` for explicit C20, FTP, MLSS, or threshold-TTE goals, with readiness/load gates and audit metadata.
Workout Reference Library v0.7: Adds 13 C20/FTP templates: TEST-C20, FTP-TTE-1 through FTP-TTE-4, FTP-OU-1/2, FTP-FATIGUE-1/2, VO2-CEIL-1/2, and FUEL-1/2.
Workout planning rules: Adds the C20 12-week block map, 8–10 h/week pattern, warm-up rules, sequencing constraints, progression examples, and fueling-practice guidance.
push.py v0.6: Builds explicit Intervals.icu `workout_doc.steps` from supported percent-FTP workout descriptions so Zwift can see structured ERG workouts.
Local data safety: `.gitignore` now excludes `data/`, `.sync_config.json`, and local logs so athlete data and API keys stay out of Git.
Upgrade: pull fresh SECTION_11.md, SKILL.md, README.md, examples/workout-library/, examples/agentic/, manifest.json, and changelog.json.
